content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/prisma/schema.prisma:1	datasource db {2	  provider = "postgresql"3	  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")4	}5	6	generator client {7	  provider = "prisma-client-js"8	}9	10	model User {11	  id            String    @id @default(cuid())12	  name          String?13	  email         String?   @unique14	  password      String?15	  role          String    @default("USER")16	  restaurants   Restaurant[]17	  orders        Order[]18	}19	20	model Restaurant {21	  id          String     @id @default(cuid())22	  name        String23	  description String?24	  address     String?25	  ownerId     String26	  owner       User       @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id])27	  menuItems   MenuItem[]28	}29	30	model MenuItem {31	  id           String     @id @default(cuid())32	  name         String33	  description  String?34	  price        Float35	  restaurantId String36	  restaurant   Restaurant @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id])37	  orderItems   OrderItem[]38	}39	40	model Order {41	  id           String      @id @default(cuid())42	  userId       String43	  user         User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])44	  status       String      @default("PENDING")45	  total        Float46	  items        OrderItem[]47	  createdAt    DateTime    @default(now())48	}49	50	model OrderItem {51	  id         String   @id @default(cuid())52	  orderId    String53	  order      Order    @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id])54	  menuItemId String55	  menuItem   MenuItem @relation(fields: [menuItemId], references: [id])56	  quantity   Int57	}
